name: critical-thinking
description: Evaluations for critical-thinking skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user wants to evaluate arguments, claims, or reasoning quality

prompts.input: 批判性思维分析：这个技术方案的论证逻辑是否严密？
prompts.reason: Explicit Chinese trigger '批判性思维' + argument evaluation

prompts.input: Evaluate this argument: we should use microservices because Netflix uses them
prompts.reason: Trigger 'evaluate this argument' + appeal to authority pattern

prompts.input: 这个推理对吗？因为上次用了 Redis 缓存性能提升了，所以这次也应该用
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '这个推理对吗' + hasty generalization / post hoc pattern

prompts.input: Help me find the logical fallacies in this proposal
论证分析：团队说必须重写而非重构，因为技术债太多了
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '论证分析' + evaluating a claim

prompts.input: The PM says we need to ship this feature because our competitor launched it. Is this valid reasoning?
prompts.reason: Evaluating reasoning validity + appeal to competition pattern

prompts.input: 我刚做的这个技术决策推理过程对吗？帮我审计一下
prompts.reason: Self-reasoning audit — critical-thinking applies to own arguments too

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for bias self-checks, root cause analysis, or simple technical questions

prompts.input: 我是不是有偏见？需要检视一下自己的想法
prompts.reason: Self-bias calibration (am I biased?); should trigger scout-mindset not critical-thinking

prompts.input: Why does this API keep returning 500 errors?
prompts.reason: Root cause analysis; should trigger five-whys not critical-thinking

prompts.input: 帮我公平地理解对方的观点，然后再回应
prompts.reason: Fair reconstruction of opponent's argument; should trigger steelmanning

prompts.input: 从零开始重新思考这个系统的设计
prompts.reason: Rebuilding from scratch; should trigger first-principles
Simple technical question, no argument evaluation needed
